content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.11% with VIX +8.97% to 18.35 signals risk-off, but defensive sectors (Pharma, IT, FMCG) are holding up. My existing book is well-positioned defensively (FMCG, Pharma, IT). Realty/PSU Bank/Energy under pressure. With 11 positions already and 45% deployed, focus is on managing winners (COFORGE +9.7%, MARICO +3%, LAURUSLABS +3.5%) rather than aggressive new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold consolidating, -1.1% small loss. SL 121 below entry, target 135 intact. Defensive hedge against risk-off. Hold per plan."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832,
      "new_target": 860,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3% with strong Q4 (vol +9%, revenue +22%). At 52w high. SL already at 832 (above entry 820, locks ₹12 gain). CMP 844.60, SL gap ~1.5% — within trail-gap discipline. No change needed — HOLD effectively. Actually no-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360,
      "new_target": 1450,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.7% — massive Q4 beat (PAT +134% YoY, EBITDA margin +232bps QoQ, $1.75B order book). CMP 1375.50, SL 1360 — gap only 1.1%, at the trail-floor minimum. Per Rule 14(c) trail-gap discipline, SL at 1360 with CMP 1375.50 is acceptable (1.1% gap). Holding SL at 1360 to lock in ₹101/share gain. Target 1450 unchanged (+5.3% from CMP, strong momentum)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF flat at entry. Q4 PAT +11% YoY, Rs 2300 Cr refrigerant capex announced. SL 2740 (-1.6% from CMP), target 2920. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.5%, at 52w high zone. FY26 PAT +32%, Rs 47/share dividend (record). Capital Goods sector weak today but POLYCAB holding up on its own catalysts. SL 8950 (-1.2% from CMP), target 9550. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.5%, recovering intraday (10511 low → 10604). Buyback at Rs 12,000 (+13% premium) provides near-term floor, record date May 29. SL 10440 (-1.5% from CMP), target 11260. Thesis (Rs 5,633 Cr buyback + Rs 150 dividend) intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -2.0%, but Q4 was strong (PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance upgrade to low double-digit). Today +1.93% intraday. SL 468 (-2.3% from CMP), target 510. Within risk budget, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255,
      "new_target": 1320,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.5%, near ATH. Q4 record print (PAT +19%, FY26 PAT +148%). SL 1255 already above entry 1226 — locks ₹29/share. CMP 1270.80, SL gap 1.25% — at trail-floor. No change to levels needed; effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM -0.5% entry but +7.66% on the day (Q4 PAT +21.5%, revenue ATH). Just entered — SL 1198 (-3.4% from CMP), target 1330. Thesis fresh, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.3%, holding up vs weak Capital Goods peers. Q4 PAT +32%, order book +61% YoY, Tallgrass US data center order. SL 850 (-1.5% from CMP), target 920. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP -0.1%, intraday +3.29%. HSBC upgrade TP Rs 9000. Q4 results May 20 — outside 3-session binary window today, but watch as date approaches. SL 7950 (-1.7%), target 8500. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, gold in consolidation. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry at 832, locking +1.5% gain. Trail-gap 1.5% acceptable. No further tightening needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1360 already locks +8% gain. Trail-gap 1.1% — at the floor; tightening further would risk forced exit on normal noise. Let it run toward 1450."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat, thesis intact, SL within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, at 52w high. Hold to target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000. Hold through ex-date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Below entry but FY27 guidance positive. Within SL budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1255 locking +2.4% gain. Trail-gap 1.25% — at floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, give it room. SL 3.4% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, fresh entry, hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "HSBC upgrade, near ATH. Q4 May 20 — monitor as date approaches but outside 3-session window today."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Rule 18 walk-through of qualifying BULLISH candidates: (1) MCX +0.00 modifier — REJECT, NEUTRAL not BULLISH, plus Q4 concall TODAY 4PM = binary event within session. (2) TORNTPHARM -0.03 modifier — REJECT, NEUTRAL/Bearish, stock 13-18% above broker targets, Q4 pending in May = binary risk. (3) DRREDDY -0.02 modifier — REJECT, Q4 results TOMORROW = binary event within 1 session, Rule 11 hard reject for new entries. (4) Already hold MARICO+DABUR+TATACONSUM (FMCG cluster ~12% capital — at cluster watch), COFORGE (IT), LAURUSLABS+APOLLOHOSP (Pharma/Healthcare cluster), POLYCAB+CGPOWER (Capital Goods cluster ~13% capital, near cluster cap of 20%). HFCL pending order from prior session at 133.50 — letting it sit (telecom sector, no new info to cancel). With 11 positions and 45% deployed, focus is risk-managed; no qualifying high-conviction new entry today given VIX spike and broad-market weakness.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-positioned: 6 of 11 positions in defensive sectors (FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare, IT, Gold ETF) which are outperforming today. Three winners (COFORGE +9.7%, LAURUSLABS +3.5%, MARICO +3%) all have SLs above entry locking gains. Deployment 45% with ₹551K cash gives optionality for tomorrow's DRREDDY Q4 reaction or any VIX-driven dislocation. Rolling 5-day win-rate 13% is concerning but driven by tight prior-week SL hits; current book composition is materially stronger. NO_ACTION on new admits today justified by: (a) VIX +9% spike signaling regime shift, (b) cluster caps tightening (Capital Goods ~13%, FMCG ~12%), (c) DRREDDY binary tomorrow argues for preserving cash for post-event setups. HFCL pending BUY at 133.50 from prior session left intact — no new info to invalidate. Will revisit afternoon if VIX cools and Nifty holds 23,845 support."
}
